itemListElement.reviewBody:
यह रहा वह पत्र:

Dear Concerned Authority,

I am writing to express my extreme dissatisfaction and disappointment with K.R. Mangalam World School, Vaishali, Ghaziabad. The school's environment is detrimental to the growth and development of its students, with a lack of encouragement and support for students' progress.

The school's administration, under the current Principal, Ms. Seema Behl, has been found lacking in professionalism and empathy. There have been instances of alleged harassment and discriminatory behavior, which is unacceptable.

I strongly urge the school administration and relevant authorities to take immediate action to address these concerns and ensure a safe and inclusive learning environment for all students.

The school's reputation was notably better during the tenure of Ms. Yashika Bhardwaj as Principal, and it is disappointing to see the decline in standards under the current leadership.

I request a thorough investigation into these allegations and appropriate action against those responsible.

The lady controlling the Princy office is arrogant and I'll mannered .Teachers insults the students in class even if they are bright students.Teachere just need pet students and they are given marks on.the basis of their buttering tacts.Management is horrible.All.good tetachers left the school.New teachers few of them are Princy pet ruining the school atmosphere.Its not educational.institution rather a political platform where conspiracy are made against students by princy.and her pet teachers actually they are ruining students career by lowering down their confidence level.

Principle is very rude and arrogant and few teachers insults the students in class hence breaking their confidence even if they scores well and generally teachers pets scores well.Earlier this school was in good shape but now it's hell for students

I regret going to K.R. Mangalam, Vaishali. The teachers are continuously leaving, and the new principal, Seema Behl, is nothing less than a dictator who does not care about the students' well-being. Her attitude towards parents is also appalling, and she does not listen to their concerns. She has made unnecessary rules in school, which only make this school a living hell. Every prominent teacher who was in this school for a long tenure has left since Seema came. She has also made teachers' lives really difficult, and this is not a good career opportunity to pursue, in my opinion.

In the session of 2022-2023, she failed around 65% of Class 9th and 11th. Most of the five-star reviews you see are given by their school teachers only, and mostly are fake. Everything is done for publicity. While the teachers do their best to help the students, if you try to do the same with the management (who was actually supposed to help the students), it would be plainly ignored. There is no option otherwise school doesn't even deserve half a star! Even new teachers who join leave school within 2-3 months.

I am disappointed with the school's management, which has failed to provide a conducive learning environment for the students. The school is not worth the high fees, and I would not recommend it to anyone. Even a government school would be better than this. This school is not what it is advertised for and just requires your fees, and you won't imagine what your ward will go through!

This was a good school before. But now new principal Seema Behl has made it the worst for students. She wants to decide on students future herself rather than giving them freedom to choose their career, she wants to force her choice on students. My child was threatened by her to attend a counselling program during exams which was organised by her friend or else she will not allow him to sit in examinations. she has started Gundagardi since she arrived. Also never want to meet any parent she pretends to be super busy and throws tantrums which is making life difficult for teachers and students. Avoid this school now. Not worth

Worst principal in academic session 2023. Here your child will be forced to take stream which principal orders in Class 11. Also principal is least interested in student's future. She has a background of some worst school of West Delhi which she is applying here to make this a worst school as well. Better consider other school in Ghaziabad.
K R Mangalam World School, Vaishali provided every child with care and also strong emphasis is laid on inculcating good values in children. Would recommend it as the best school in Ghaziabad.

This school failed 60%of student In class 11 because they were average students because school had to score good score in boards and take fees. All the reviews which you are seeing here are fake it's reputation is very low. When parents of class 11 students who were failed were treated  very badly they not even given chairs to sit the new principal behaves like an illiterate the teacher are not skilled. It's the worst school in ghaziabad. If you got your child enrolled in this school you are just gonna ruin your child's future. The reptionist is very rude.
The old principal was very nice. But the new principal is very rude she tells parents that TC kar wana hai toe kar wa lijiye. This school is only made to earn money not educate children
This school is especially for clases nursery to class 1. The teacher humiliate children's in front of class and destroy their confidence.
